reason: Tests check exact implementation patterns (variable names like 'node_with_version.first', 'size_t removed = 0', specific type 'std::vector<std::pair<String, int32_t>>') via text regex matching. To pass 'behavior_in_task_description', instruction must specify these exact patterns. But to pass 'no_solution_leakage', instruction must NOT specify the fix details. These requirements are mutually exclusive given the test structure. The tests need restructuring to verify behavior (compilation, execution, mocking) rather than text patterns.
